headline: JPMorgan Lowers its Price Target on Molson Coors Beverage Company (TAP) to $45 and Maintains a Neutral Rating
summary: Molson Coors Beverage Company (NYSE:TAP) is among the 13 Most Undervalued S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On February 25, 2026, JPMorgan lowered its price target on Molson Coors Beverage Company (NYSE:TAP) to $45 from $50 and maintained a Neutral rating following the company’s Q4 report. The same day, BofA downgraded Molson Coors to Underperform […]
